orchestration.phase3: KJ consolidation, minimal edits, graph derivation, schema and deterministic revalidation

methods.name: 批判的思考
methods.result: system plannerがtracker mutationを所有する必要性を否定しintent-only境界を維持

methods.name: 演繹思考
methods.result: 5 kindから12 build componentsを再導出

methods.name: 帰納的思考
methods.result: atomic promotionとregistration receiptの既往patternを適用

methods.name: アブダクション
methods.result: promotion済みだが一部未登録となる原因をbatch契約欠落と特定

methods.name: 垂直思考
methods.result: spec引用からpromotion、N task登録receipt、L4 handoffまで連続確認

methods.name: 要素分解
methods.result: promotion transactionとdev-graph registration transactionを別commit point化

methods.name: MECE
methods.result: 13要件・12 components/routes・38 nodesを照合

methods.name: 2軸思考
methods.result: workstream_kind×build_target_kindとphase×execution DAGを分離

methods.name: プロセス思考
methods.result: staging→evaluate→promote→register→receipt→handoffを閉鎖

methods.name: メタ思考
methods.result: planner選択とtracker選択を別規則として検証

methods.name: 抽象化思考
methods.result: system plannerをtyped task intent producerへ抽象化

methods.name: ダブル・ループ思考
methods.result: GitHub-only publication前提をtracker-neutral intentへ改定

methods.name: ブレインストーミング
methods.result: partial registration、peer drift、both ambiguity、stale lockを候補化

methods.name: 水平思考
methods.result: dev-graph/Beads authority契約をregistration boundaryへ横展開

methods.name: 逆説思考
methods.result: planner内tracker mutation追加が二重authorityを生むため採用せず

methods.name: 類推思考
methods.result: database batch commitからall-or-none receiptを類推

methods.name: if思考
methods.result: 1 node不正、peer不互換、mode=both+auto、hook crashを反証fixture化

methods.name: 素人思考
methods.result: indexのplugin/system選定とtracker handoffを明示

methods.name: システム思考
methods.result: 12 route networkと外部dev-graph consumerを閉鎖

methods.name: 因果関係分析
methods.result: promotion receiptだけではL4 readyにならずregistration receiptを必須化

methods.name: 因果ループ
methods.result: replayをper-node digestとbatch digestで冪等化

methods.name: トレードオン思考
methods.result: planner独立性とdev-graph統合をcontract preflightで両立

methods.name: プラスサム思考
methods.result: intent producerとmutation consumerの責務分担で手戻り削減

methods.name: 価値提案思考
methods.result: 全componentを実装可能task specと安全handoff価値へtrace

methods.name: 戦略的思考
methods.result: dev-graph peer contract preflightで将来schema driftをfail-closed

methods.name: why思考
methods.result: 完了漏れの上流原因をbinding intentとreceipt不足まで深掘り

methods.name: 改善思考
methods.result: component数を変えずschema/template/registration/hookをEdit更新

methods.name: 仮説思考
methods.result: 既存registration完全性仮説をpartial batchで反証し修正

methods.name: 論点思考
methods.result: 4条件直結のintent/receipt/hook scopeを優先

methods.name: KJ法
methods.result: findingsをintent、batch receipt、peer preflight、hook lockへ統合

consolidated_findings.root_cause: N task registrationにall-or-none receiptがない
dev-graph runtime contract driftを検出できない
readiness hookのsettings SSOTとstale lock回復が曖昧

separate_non_L3_blocker.effect: L3 plan PASSを無効化しないが実装済みを意味しない
